entity.summary: Native GalaChain decentralized exchange providing self-custodial token swaps, concentrated-liquidity pools, market and pool analytics, portfolio and swap history, and on-chain settlement through the GalaChain DEX protocol.
entity.notes: Current first-party GalaSwap application describes a non-custodial GalaChain DEX with real-time swap quotes, concentrated-liquidity positions, pool volume and APR views, portfolio history, and wallet-signed on-chain settlement. The official GalaChain organization maintains the DEX chaincode repository and related GalaSwap tooling, with the DEX repository updated in July 2026.

evidence.title: GalaSwap official decentralized exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party application identifies GalaSwap as GalaChain's native decentralized exchange and documents self-custodial swaps, concentrated-liquidity pools, live pair and volume data, portfolio history, wallet signing, and on-chain settlement.

evidence.title: GalaChain DEX chaincode repository
evidence.notes: Official GalaChain organization repository identifies and maintains the GalaChain DEX chaincode, corroborating the exchange protocol identity and current first-party implementation.
